data.html_notes:
Device: iPhone 16 iOS 26.5 Environment: Staging build 2.3.0 (638) STR:
  1. Launch the wallet
  2. Log in to the wallet
  3. Open Swap screen
  4. Choose Swap From: USDT ETH, Swap To: BTC on-chain
  5. Enter an amount more than $10
  6. Confirm Swap
  7. Open Transaction history
  8. Apply the filter "Type": Swapped
Actual result: Infinite loader is displayed, an error in the log Expected result: No errors and an infinite loader should be
data.name: [Swap] Infinite loader is displayed after swap USDT ETH to BTC
